# Implementation Plan: Evaluating the Statistical Validity of Public A/B Test Summaries

**Branch**: `001-eval-ab-test-validity` | **Date**: 2026-06-24 | **Spec**: `specs/001-evaluating-the-statistical-validity-of-p/spec.md`
**Input**: Feature specification from `specs/001-evaluating-the-statistical-validity-of-p/spec.md`

## Summary

This feature implements an automated audit pipeline that extracts statistical metrics (sample sizes, effect sizes, p-values) from publicly available A/B test summaries, reconstructs the underlying statistical tests, and flags inconsistencies when reported values  [... full chunk preserved on disk; desummarize() to retrieve.]

| D004 | Create `audit_record.schema.yaml` contract | FR-024, FR-026 | D002 |
| D005 | Create `manifest.schema.yaml` contract | FR-024, T077 | D002 |
| D006 | Create `synthetic_validation.schema.yaml` contract | FR-030, FR-031 | D001 |
| D007 | Design Quickstart documentation structure | FR-028, SC-028 | None |

| **CI timeout** | I014 monitors resources; pipeline exits early if approaching 6h limit |
| **Statistical test mismatch** | FR-026 requires Monte Carlo validation; SC-003 enforced |
| **Multiple testing inflation** | All hypothesis tests use Holm-Bonferroni correction (research.md) |
